data.title: GREEN: Implement AcliClient.get_issue_links()
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Implement AcliClient.get_issue_links(jira_key) as an instance method on the AcliClient class in acli-integration.py. This method queries existing issue links for a given Jira issue, used by the LINK handler for pre-create dedup.

## Implementation Details
- Add get_issue_links(jira_key) method to AcliClient class
- Use ACLI Go command: jira workitem link list --key <jira_key> --json (or equivalent)
- Parse output into list of link dicts with type, inwardIssue, outwardIssue fields
- Follow existing AcliClient method patterns (self._run(), raise on error)

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/acli-integration.py (Edit: add get_issue_links method to AcliClient)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] AcliClient has get_issue_links(jira_key) instance method
  Verify: grep -q "def get_issue_links" plugins/dso/scripts/acli-integration.py
- [ ] RED tests from task 53e8-d39a now pass
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py -k "get_issue_links" --tb=short -q
